storage_boundary.explanation: The exact certificate payload alone is near but below the cap. The failed projection is caused by duplicating certificate and LP-dual payloads inside per-case results and again inside the aggregate summary. The existing immutable artifacts remain preserved.

next_experiment.name: compact-weighted-certificate-storage-audit
next_experiment.work: Build a non-destructive compact receipt schema over the existing 96 immutable results: retain each exact certificate once; replace embedded certificate and full LP-dual payloads with content hashes and scalar measurements; replace aggregate outcome duplication with case-id/status/hash rows. Independently compare all 96 compact receipts against the full source artifacts and rerun the exact arithmetic checker.
next_experiment.compute: No new LP, SAT, PB, or proof search.
next_experiment.success_gate: All 96 compact receipts bind byte-exactly to the existing certificates, all 96 arithmetic checks pass, and the measured projection for all 4,402 cubes including compact receipts, certificates, indices, and safety margin is below 50 MB.
next_experiment.route_if_passed: Freeze a segmented arithmetic-certificate scale over the 4,300 still-open cubes in the audited 4,402-cube paired partition; stop for review before running it.
next_experiment.route_if_failed: Keep the 102 certified cubes and redesign the certificate representation itself; do not scale while storage remains above the declared cap.

claim_limit: The 96 sampled exact cubes are independently certified arithmetic contradictions. No containing formula, fifth leaf, fourth parent, ordinary classification, or C(12,6,4) theorem claim follows.
